description: Create a GitHub Actions CD pipeline that triggers on push of tags matching v*.*.*. The pipeline consists of three jobs: ci_succeed, create_release, and publish. The ci_succeed job checks the CI status of the last master push. If successful, create_release job creates a new release with changelog and version information. If both ci_succeed and create_release jobs succeed, the publish job builds and publishes the package to PyPI using a poetry-publish action.
